scripts.dev: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml uvicorn ml.inference:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.start: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml uvicorn ml.inference:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}
scripts.build: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml python -m compileall packages/ml/src/ml
scripts.lint: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml ruff check packages/ml/src/ml packages/ml/tests apps/ml-inference
scripts.typecheck: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml mypy packages/ml/src/ml
scripts.test: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml pytest packages/ml/tests/test_inference.py -v
